content: The agent's retrospective classification of the first 12 pairs was ratified by the user as correct. This validates the classifier's approach: decisions and ratifications get written to Octowiki, procedural exchanges get discarded, unresolved topics become open questions.

provenance.raw_agent: Looking at the 12 pairs, here's what the triage system would have extracted: [detailed classification of all pairs]
provenance.what_was_ratified: The retrospective classification of the first 12 pairs — what would be written to Octowiki, what would be discarded, what would be flagged as open questions
